top_signals.title: AI wealth must benefit the public, South Korea's deputy PM says amid Samsung labor tensions
top_signals.summary: South Korea's deputy PM tells CNBC there are concerns as to whether AI could worsen wealth gaps or lead to job losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
